title: LoopDefinitionRuntime
description: Runtime-oriented schema for the loop state transition API contract.

loop_id.description: Unique identifier for the loop instance.

current_phase.description: The current execution phase of the loop.

gate_criteria.description: List of criteria that must be satisfied before transitioning to the next phase.

max_retries.description: Maximum retry attempts before the circuit breaker trips.

circuit_breaker_threshold.description: Number of consecutive failures that triggers the circuit breaker.
